posts.text:
If we’re keeping score at home, Gavin Newsom grew up poor, can’t read, and after years of showing zero sign of any disability, is going all-in on Biden’s stutter strategy. Incredible.


Jennifer Siebel Newsom (@JenSiebelNewsom)

Learning differences do not determine someone’s potential, but making fun of those with them certainly does.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/JenSiebelNewsom/status/2033936139011445098#m

Somebody should declare World War 3 on this person’s lid…


Defiant L’s (@DefiantLs)

Kyle Kulinski on Trump: "He's gotta go... He needs to be impeached... He's destabilizing the world. We could already be in WW3!"

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/DefiantLs/status/2034029509863932291#m

Tremendous.


Shawn Farash (@Shawn_Farash)

TRUMP CELEBRATES ST. PATRICK'S DAY ☘️

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Shawn_Farash/status/2033880505431511332#m

ICYMI from Hannity last night...


TV News Now (@TVNewsNow)

🚨 NEW: Fox’s Joe Concha says the legacy media now reflexively opposes anything tied to Trump, arguing their bias drives them to amplify negatives and ignore positives:

“After 10 years of us talking about this stuff, I think we can safely come to one cold and incontrovertible fact: if it’s good for Trump—and therefore good for the country—the legacy media will reflexively be against it.”

“Let’s put it this way: Trump could issue an ex

Don’s latest YouTube broadcast released this morning has generated a whopping 33,000 views at the time of this writing this afternoon.


Tom Elliott (@tomselliott)

Don Lemon says CNN firing him was a “blessing in disguise”: “Can you imagine being there right now?”

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/tomselliott/status/2032892090728775683#m

She’s getting a town hall on this network soon, isn’t she?


Tom Elliott (@tomselliott)

Fmr. Rep. @mtgreenee: "The younger generations -- I'm, Gen X -- Millennials & Gen Z are very much against this war ... It's very generational. And the younger generations are completely against it. We want we want world peace, we want good trade, we want a great economy, we want to lower inflation, lower the cost of housing."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/tomselliott/status/2033574449035772111#m

So weird that Kimmel is saying America is losing its right to free speech while saying so on national television in a tuxedo…


LateNighter (@latenightercom)

Jimmy Kimmel presenting at the Oscars: "There are some countries whose leaders don't support free speech. I'm not at liberty to say which. Let's just leave it at North Korea and CBS."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/latenightercom/status/2033352873497465326#m

Yep.


Guy Benson (@guypbenson)

In light of the outrage at ODU, Congressional Republicans should introduce a very simple bill stating that naturalized citizens convicted of terrorism charges are subject to denaturalization. What is the argument against that?

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/guypbenson/status/2033336412225896895#m

And we’ve reached the impossibly insufferable portion of our program…


Variety (@Variety)

Jimmy Kimmel takes a dig at CBS at the #Oscars: “As you know, there are some countries whose leaders don’t support free speech. Let’s just leave it at North Korea and CBS.”

(via ABC/AMPAS)

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Variety/status/2033352461784916341#m

I think it’s safe to say that we had an insane (or at the very least… highly immature) person running the FBI for years……


Collin Rugg (@CollinRugg)

NEW: Former FBI Director James Comey says he once started singing Beyoncé's song 'Sandcastles' in a crowded room while being briefed on an important operation.  

"The briefer started by saying the operation was codenamed Sandcastles..."  
  
"So I said, 'Oh, like the Beyonce song.' Blank stares all around the FBI conference room. So I did the nat

What Don is also saying is that (without realizing it, of course) he got fired for not being factual nor a journalist, because why else would they have axed him?


Benny Johnson (@bennyjohnson)

Don Lemon says CNN shouldn’t move to the middle politically because those folks are “never going to watch any network that’s a factual news organization.”

This ridiculously implies that both CNN is a factual news organization and their current viewers want facts.

Good one 🍋!

Video
  





— https://ni

This run by the Italians is insane.


Shawn Spradling (@Shawn_Spradling)

The Italian broadcast call of Italy’s historic win over Puerto Rico in the World Baseball Classic Quarterfinals, on Sky Sports 🇮🇹

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Shawn_Spradling/status/2032953824193720555#m
My latest for The Washington Examiner:  washingtonexaminer.com/in_fo…
The Moms cleaned up nicely for the elementary school fundraiser last night…

Absolutely an upgrade. Well done, Titans!


Adam Schefter (@AdamSchefter)

A glimpse of the Titans’ new uniforms:

— https://nitter.net/AdamSchefter/status/2032265400319148177#m
